title: Seat Cover Installation
shortDescription: Professional installation of premium seat covers for a perfect, custom fit.
overview: Our seat cover installation service ensures your new covers fit like they were made for your vehicle. We handle removal of old covers, proper alignment, and secure fitting so you get a factory-like finish.
includes: Removal of existing seat covers (if any)
Secure attachment (hooks, straps, or custom fit)
benefits: Protects original upholstery from wear and stains
Easy to remove and wash (where applicable)
process: Book appointment and confirm vehicle model
We prepare covers for your car
Installation at your location or our workshop
pricing: Starting from $80 for installation. Price depends on vehicle and cover type.

title: Window Visors / Rain Guards Installation
shortDescription: Expert fitting of window visors and rain guards for style and function.
overview: Window visors add a sleek look to your car while allowing you to crack windows open in light rain. We install in-channel or tape-on visors with precision for a clean, OEM-style finish.
includes: Selection of in-channel or tape-on visors
benefits: Reduce rain entering when windows are slightly open
pricing: Starting from $45 for installation. Product cost varies by vehicle.

title: Car Mats Installation
shortDescription: Custom car mats and trunk liners installed for maximum protection and fit.
overview: We supply and install front mats, rear mats, and trunk liners tailored to your vehicle. Perfect fit means no slipping and full coverage of footwells and cargo area.
benefits: Protect carpet from dirt, mud, and spills
process: We order or prepare for your vehicle
Retention clips or hooks fitted if needed
pricing: Starting from $30 for installation. Mat sets from $45.
